# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 80
    path: /user/
    protocol: http

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 80
    path: /product/
    protocol: http

routes:
  - name: user-route
    protocols: [http, https]
    paths:
      - /user/*
    service: user-service
    upstream_hash_fallback: true
    strip_path: false

  - name: product-route
    protocols: [http, https]
    paths:
      - /product/*
    service: product-service
    upstream_hash_fallback: true
    strip_path: false

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_in_header: x-api-key
      key_required: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      shared: true
      upstream:
        requests_per_second: 10
        window: 60
